zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir James Danby於大約1439年出生在英國越可爾貝達爾時，他的父親Robert Danby II42歲，母親Elizabeth Aslaby27歲。他和Agnes Langton至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1496年10月9日在英國越可爾利德斯享年58歲。

zh-hans.Aislaby, Stockton-on-Tees district, Durh: 英国英格兰達勒姆艾斯拉比
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir James Danby于大约1439年出生在英国越可爾貝達爾时，他的父亲Robert Danby II42岁，母亲Elizabeth Aslaby27岁。他和Agnes Langton至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1496年10月9日在英国越可爾利德斯享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Danby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Danby in North Yorkshire, originally named in Old Norse as Danabȳ ‘settlement of the Danes’, and thus cognate with Denby .

variants.name: Denby
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from any of the places so named in Yorkshire. A cognate of Danby , ‘settlement of the Danes’, but here the Old Norse first element has been replaced by the cognate Old English Dene.

variants.name: Dansby
meanings: English: presumably a habitational name from a lost or unidentified place in an area of Scandinavian settlement; perhaps a variant of   Danby  .

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir James Danby was born about 1439, in Bedale, Yorkshire, England, his father, Robert Danby II, was 42 and his mother, Elizabeth Aslaby, was 27. He had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Agnes Langton. He died on 9 October 1496, in Leeds, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir James Danby est né environ 1439, à Bedale, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert Danby II, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Aslaby, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Agnes Langton. Il est décédé le 9 octobre 1496, à Leeds, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir James Danby um 1439 in Bedale, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Danby II 42 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Aslaby 27. Er hatte mit Agnes Langton mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Oktober 1496 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Leeds, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Danby è nato il circa 1439 nel Bedale, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Danby II, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Aslaby, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Agnes Langton. Morì il 9 ottobre 1496, nel Leeds, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir James Danbyが約1439年にイギリスヨークシュアイアベダルで生まれた時，父Robert Danby IIは42歳，母Elizabeth Aslabyは27歳であった。彼はAgnes Langtonとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1496年10月9日にイギリスヨークシュアイアリーズで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir James Danby(이)가 대략 1439년 영국 요르크실르 베데일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Danby II(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Aslaby(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Agnes Langton(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1496년 10월 9일 영국 요르크실르 리드즈에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Danby nasceu aproximadamente 1439, em Bedale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Danby II, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Aslaby, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Agnes Langton. Ele faleceu em 9 de outubro de 1496, em Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir James Danby родился около 1439 г. в местности бедеил, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Danby II было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Aslaby, 27. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Agnes Langton. Он умер 9 октября 1496 г. в местности лидс, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir James Danby nació aproximadamente 1439, en Bedale, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Danby II, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Aslaby, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Agnes Langton. Murió el 9 de octubre de 1496, en Leeds, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años.
